schedule.description: Story 3 — Paul upset at Queen's Club
Story 1 — Halle QF preview for Friday

stories.title: Halle QF Set — Zverev, Shelton, Fritz All Through

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Halle R16 complete. ✅

Zverev def. Hanfmann 6-3, 4-6, 6-2
Shelton def. Quinn 7-5, 6-3
Fritz def. Marozsan
Bellucci def. Collignon 7-6(6), 6-1

Four through. QF "Super Friday" is stacked. 🎾 #Halle2026 #TerraWortmannOpen [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Zverev. Shelton. Fritz. All in the Halle QF.

Sinner skipping all grass. Alcaraz out. The Wimbledon men's picture is shaping fast.

Super Friday in Halle: Tiafoe vs FAA + Altmaier vs Medvedev. 🎾 #Halle2026 #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

stories.title: Badosa Stuns Gauff in Berlin — No. 142 Beats No. 7

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
BADOSA BEATS GAUFF.

World No. 142 def. No. 7 seed Coco Gauff 1-6, 6-3, 6-2 at Berlin.

Down a set and a break. Won 12 of the next 16 games. Five-match losing streak: over. 🎾 #BerlinOpen #WTATennis [URL]

article.headline: Badosa Stuns Gauff in Berlin: World No. 142 Beats No. 7 Seed in Three-Set Comeback

stories.title: Van de Zandschulp Upsets Defending Champion Paul at Queen's Club

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Tommy Paul won Queen's Club in 2024.

He was back to defend his title. Lost in R2 to van de Zandschulp 6-4, 2-6, 6-3.

Defending champions keep falling. Wimbledon is 11 days away. 🎾 #QueensClub2026 [URL]

stories.title: Berlin QF Landscape After Gauff Exit — Sabalenka, Rybakina, Badosa Through

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Berlin QF draw:

Sabalenka def. Alexandrova 6-4, 6-4 ✅
Rybakina through ✅
Badosa through (just beat Gauff) ✅
Pegula through ✅

Gauff is out. Final is Sunday — last major result before the Wimbledon draw. 🎾 #BerlinOpen [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Wimbledon is 11 days away.

Qualifying starts Monday at Roehampton.
Draw ceremony: June 26.
Championships: June 29.

Sinner defending. Alcaraz out. Berlin final still to come. 🎾 #Wimbledon2026 #WTATennis [URL]
